---
title: "activity"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(agridat)
library(ggpubr)
```

```{r}
url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stat720/summer2026/refs/heads/main/data/data_inclass_06182026.csv"
df <- read.csv(url)
```

```{r}
View(df)
```

```{r}

df |> ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row))+
  geom_tile(aes(fill = block))
  

```

```{r}
df |>
  filter(block == "B4") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row))+
  geom_tile(aes(fill = gen)) +
  coord_fixed()
```

Model

```{r}
m <- lmer(yield ~ 1 + inoc*gen*dry*dust + (1|block/gen/dry:dust) , data = df)
m
```


```{r}
summary(m) 

sigma(m)^2
```


```{r}
library(emmeans)
car::Anova(m, type =2)

plot(emmeans(m, ~dust:dry))

```
